subject: biology
title: 22M.1.SL.TZ2.19
question_html:
Which activity directly contributes the most to recent increases in atmospheric CO2 concentrations?

A. Landfills

B. Planting trees

C. Cattle rearing

D. Burning of fossil fuels
examiners_html: This was an easy question for most candidates with 89 % answering correctly.
